districts.name: Caravan Gate
districts.summary: Shade contracts, water tallies, and arriving animals pass beneath mirrored sun-cloths.
districts.featureDescription: The copper face shows how much noon each traveler still owes the road.

districts.name: Shade Market
districts.summary: Awnings sell distinct temperatures while well-singers test every jar of water.
districts.featureDescription: A blue awning holds a square of late day even at noon.

districts.name: Well Court
districts.summary: Caravan news and royal water law circulate around a deep, opinionated well.
districts.featureDescription: Its echo returns a traveler name instead of the sound offered.

landmarks.name: the camp that departed yesterday
landmarks.description: Warm coals and taut tent shadows remain after every person, animal, and tent has gone.
